username.description: SurveyCTO account username/email, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username. Never logged.

password.description: SurveyCTO password or API key, sent as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: SurveyCTO API base URL, e.g. https://<server_name>.surveycto.com/api/v2. Required (see server_name below for why this bundle cannot derive it automatically).

server_name.description: Bare SurveyCTO server name (no scheme/path), for documentation/reference only -- not wired into any template. Legacy derived https://<server_name>.surveycto.com/api/v2 from this value in Go; the engine's declarative dialect has no base-URL-derivation mechanism (see docs.md Known limits), so base_url must be supplied directly.

form_id.description: SurveyCTO form ID; required for the submissions stream, which is scoped to a single form (the real API has no 'list all form ids' stream-friendly endpoint -- see docs.md Known limits).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
